response.justification: While Bogdan meets the minimum educational and experience requirements (Bachelor's degree + 14 years professional experience), his entire career is rooted in full-stack software development with no hardware architecture experience. The role demands specialized expertise in SoC modeling, GPU architecture analysis, and AI accelerator hardware-software co-design. His recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is software-level tooling (MCP frameworks), not hardware-level performance analysis. This is a fundamental domain mismatch that general software seniority cannot bridge.
strengths: Meets minimum qualifications: Bachelor's degree completed 2012 + 14 years of documented professional experience
Demonstrated system architecture and performance optimization expertise at software scale (microservices handling millions of requests/sec, low-latency systems)
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure and proven ability to rapidly learn emerging technology domains across roles
concerns: Zero hardware architecture, SoC modeling, or chip design experience—the core technical foundation of this role
No background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD systems, or AI accelerator optimization—key preferred qualifications
Career entirely focused on software development domains (web, mobile, cloud) with no evidence of hardware-software co-design or hardware performance analysis work

key_factors.factor: Missing hardware-software co-design and SoC/IP expertise
No GPU architecture or AI accelerator optimization background
14 years of professional software engineering experience meets minimum threshold
